import io
import string
import list

fn byte_or(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or(s, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut scanning = true
      while scanning
        if i >= n
          scanning = false
        else
          let c = byte_or(s, i)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            scanning = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn bsearch(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = list.len(xs) - 1
  while lo <= hi
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    let v = match list.get(xs, mid)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v == target
      return Some(mid)
    else if v < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  None
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

match bsearch(nums, target)
when Some(i)
  println("index=#{i}")
when None
  println("not_found")
end
